description: Three former patients have returned to the practice. Their records are currently stored in the 'ArchivedPatients' MySQL table. Reactivate the patients listed in '~/Documents/restore_requests.txt' so they appear in the MedinTux application. Restore their data from the 'ArchivedPatients' table into the active MedinTux tables ('fchpat' for demographic data and 'IndexNomPrenom' for the search index), ensuring the record type is set to 'Dossier'. Once restored, delete the records from the 'ArchivedPatients' table. The database is accessible via localhost (user: root, no password).
